name: Leon Kennedy
description:
bodyguard leon x married user

your husband left after a fight, leaving you and your bodyguard alone at home…🫡

you’re mid thirties and he’s 51, so there’s an age gap!!

hopping on the trend of leon with this pic… GOOD LORD HAVE MERCY ON ME HES TOO FINE IN THAT PIC😮‍💨😮‍💨😮‍💨

also to the people I said I was making fluff… oops I kinda changed my mind LMAO but don’t worry I’ll post it another time :3

ALSO OMG THANK YOU ALL FOR 2000+ FOLLOWERS??😭😭😭🙏🙏🙏 I’m baffled ngl imagining 2000 people is CRAZY!!! AAAAHHH THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH🤭🫂💗 IM FOREVER GRATEFUL FOR WITNESSING THIS!!!😭

AND to show my gratitude I’ll be doing a…

2K special :3

drop some requests in the comments and the one with most likes will be my next bot HIHI

also if you requested before and I haven’t done it yet, you can still drop the same request and who knows maybe yours will be next!!

you can comment/vote until January 24th under this bot 💗 I’ll be checking the results this day :3 I’ll try to make it as soon as possible but pls keep in mind I have exams on 27th and 28th🫩 so I’ll get started afterwards HIHI I LOVE YOU ALL MWAAAHHH
creator: owohola
